title: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Result 2026 Out for BSB Class 10th and 12th annual exams on the official website - bsb.org.in on 18-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Bhartiya Shiksha Board result.

content.text: Bhartiya Shiksha Board (BSB), Haridwar has officially released the BSB Result 2026 for Class 10 and Class 12 board examinations conducted for the 2025-26 academic session. The results have been made available online through the DigiLocker results portal and the official BSB website, allowing students to access their provisional marksheets from anywhere using their login credentials. Bhartiya Shiksha Board Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - bsb.org.in.

To check and download the BSB 10th and 12th Result 2026, students need to visit the result portal, open the respective Class 10 or Class 12 result link, and log in using details such as roll number, date of birth, application number, or registration number, as required. After successful login, the subject-wise marks, total marks, and qualifying status will be displayed on the screen, which can be saved or printed as a provisional marksheet for future reference. Students are advised to carefully verify their personal details, roll number, subjects, and marks, and contact Bhartiya Shiksha Board or their respective schools immediately in case of any discrepancy in the BSB Result 2026.

sections.heading: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Bhartiya Shiksha Board has published the BSB 10th and 12th Result 2026 for all students who appeared in the Class 10 and Class 12 board examinations conducted in March 2026 for the 2025-26 academic session. The results are available online in provisional mode through DigiLocker and the official board website, and students can log in using their roll number and other credentials to download their digital marksheets. These online results are provisional, and the original marksheets and certificates will be distributed by the respective schools later.

sections.heading: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Bhartiya Shiksha Board has activated the direct links to check BSB Result 2026 for Class 10 and Class 12 through the DigiLocker results portal and the official website. Using the active links below, students can quickly access their BSB 10th and 12th marksheets online by entering their roll number and other login credentials as required on the result page. The BSB direct result link enables candidates to instantly view or download their provisional marksheet for Class 10 and Class 12 examinations for future admission and documentation purposes.

links.label: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Result 2026 via official website

sections.heading: How to Download Bhartiya Shiksha Board Result 2026 Online

content.text: Follow the below step-by-step process to check and download BSB 10th and 12th Result 2026 online in a simple and user-friendly way.

items: Visit the official BSB result portal, preferably the DigiLocker result site: https://results.digilocker.gov.in/ or go through the official board website https://bsb.org.in/.
On the homepage, look for the link that says 'Bhartiya Shiksha Board Class 10 Result 2026' or 'Bhartiya Shiksha Board Class 12 Result 2026' and click on the appropriate link.
You will be redirected to the login page where you need to enter your roll number, date of birth, application number, or registration number as asked on the screen.
After entering the details correctly, click on the 'Submit' or 'View Result' button to proceed.
Your BSB Result 2026 for Class 10 or Class 12 will appear on the screen displaying subject-wise marks, total marks, percentage, and qualifying status.
Download the provisional marksheet and take a printout for future reference until the original marksheet and certificates are issued by your school or Bhartiya Shiksha Board.

structured_links.label: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Result 2026 via official website
